Hints.HintText: Optional Keyboard Controls - WASD to move and JKL to attack with your weapons.
To start a Charge Attack using the Mouse, hold down the Left Mouse Button over an enemy.  Release the button when your attack is fully charged.
Hold down the SHIFT button to shoot without moving.
Hold down the Z, X, or C Buttons to start Charging.  When the circle around your Hero is full, let go to release a powerful Charge Attack!
Hold down the Left Mouse button to make your Hero walk toward the cursor.
Why not try using the keyboard to play? Use the Arrow keys to move and attack with ZXC or try moving with WASD and attacking with JKL!
Collect Orange Stars to fill your Dungeon Buster meter. When it's full, press B to use your Dungeon Buster attack!
The max level a Hero can achieve is 100.
Magic Spells, Throwing Weapons, Charge Attacks, and other Special Weapons and Attacks all consume Mana when used.
Heroes earn 2 Training Points per level for a total of 200 points at level 100!
You can put up to 75 training points in each category!
Open Chests to find new weapons. Rarer chests yield better weapons!
Different weapons come with different attack types. Find all the weapons to try all the different attack types.
What you find inside a locked chest will differ depending on which hero you use to open it!
Locked chests offer anything from weapons, potions and health bombs to more keys and even gems!
Be sure to look for locked chests - you will find at least one in every level!
The longer you hold down the button, the faster Repeater attacks will fire!
Some Scaling Weapons get more powerful as you hold the button down. Others shoot more projectiles!
Modifiers improve weapons by adding extra damage or status effects, increasing attack speed and much more!
Modifier effects increase on higher level modifiers, which are found on rarer weapons!
The crowd loves it when you bust Dinglepus statues!
Golem hates getting wet!
Chests have all sorts of loot in them!
Prizes from chests are randomized, but opening them with a particular character will increase your chances of getting a weapon for that character!
Looking for an extra boost? Open up Item Boxes and Royal Item Boxes to get cool items to help your character!
Stuck in a dungeon? Be sure to check the walls for weaknesses. Some walls can be torn down to reveal hidden areas and new paths!
Each of the heroes have their own specialties, so team up with different classes to take on difficult dungeons!
To get the most gold out of a dungeon, smash everything you can! This includes boxes, walls and bad guys!
For every hero you own, you get a 5% XP boost! Collect 'em all!
Feeling small? Eat a Shroom!
What's the difference between a Brute and Ms. Brute? Ms. Brute has a bow in her hair!
Don't sleep on spike traps!
Revive downed allies to fight off the hordes, but make sure the coast is clear first!
Don't be a hero!
Be a hero!
Players are given a Victory XP Bonus at the end of each dungeon.  Players who leave early forfeit this XP Bonus.
Some Dungeons have multiple floors. You must defeat all of the floors before the dungeon is clear.
You can lure enemies into Traps to gain a tactical advantage in the dungeon.
More advanced Dungeons award more Experience and better Treasure!
All XP, Gold, and Treasure found inside a Dungeon is shared with your Party. Everyone gets their fair share of the earned loot!
Send FREE Gifts to your friends from the Gifts area in town!
Don't rush to the exit too quickly! Be sure to find all the gold and treasure you can before leaving!
The game gets harder as more people join a dungeon. Be sure to stick together to fight off the waves of baddies!
The Battle Chef can cook food to heal and give special bonuses to himself and other players!
The Ranger has excellent ranged attacks, but is weak in melee combat.
Every Hero character has a unique Dungeon Buster super attack! Collect them all to build the ultimate team!
Join our Discord! : discord.gg/dungeonrampage
Follow us on TikTok @DungeonRampage!
Follow us on Instagram @officialdungeonrampage!
Follow us on Facebook @DungeonRampage!
Find new, more powerful weapons by opening locked chests with keys!
Upgrade your Hero's stats in the Training area!
Purchase and recruit new Heroes in the Tavern!
Styles give your hero a unique look!
